headline: These S&P500 stocks are moving in today's after hours session

headline: Wells Fargo Raises its Price Target on Lam Research (LRCX)
summary: Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) is one of the 10 All-Time High Stocks with Legs to Rally Further. On June 22, 2026, Wells Fargo analyst Joe Quatrochi raised the firm’s price target on Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) to $450 from $365 and maintained an Overweight rating. Wells Fargo expects semiconductor capital equipment companies to continue reporting […]

headline: Navitas Semiconductor shares are trading higher. The company announced the launch of two new packages, top-side cooled QDPAK and a low-profile TO-247-4L, to its 5th-gen GeneSiC technology platform.

headline: Chip Selloff Deepens as AI Doubts Bleed Into a Second Session
summary: Semis took another beating Tuesday as the AI capex narrative wobbled, the dollar punched to a one-year high, and all eyes turn to Micron earnings after the close.

headline: Qualcomm in talks to provide custom chip-design services to ByteDance, sources say
summary: Qualcomm is in talks to provide chip-design services to China's ByteDance, four people familiar with the matter said, as the U.S. company seeks ‌to reduce dependence on the smartphone market, its biggest revenue source.  If successful, the ‌negotiations would make ByteDance, the parent of short-video platform TikTok, an early customer of Qualcomm's chip-design services operation.  ​Qualcomm is the world's largest supplier of smartphone modem chips, which manage cellular communications.

headline: BUZZ Investing: AI Leadership Rotates And Macro Risks Reassert
summary: Memory and broader semiconductor names led the Period, with Micron Technology up 28.3% and Marvell Technology rallying, even as crowded bellwether NVIDIA fell 13.1%. Read more here.
